sourceMovie.title: Why Him?
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Why Him? for the same reason it broke through in 2016: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. John Hamburg keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Meet the Parents
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Why Him? clicked for you, Meet the Parents (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Why Him??
faq.answer: Try Meet the Parents, Daddy's Home, Death Becomes Her—each shares DNA with Why Him? while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Why Him??
faq.answer: Why Him? (2016) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Why Him? worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
